headline: Should Celsius’ PepsiCo Expansion and Alani Nu Deal Require Action From Celsius Holdings (CELH) Investors?
summary: In recent months, Celsius Holdings outlined at the CAGNY conference how its multi-brand strategy, US$1.80 billion Alani Nu acquisition, and expanded PepsiCo distribution partnership are intended to accelerate its footprint in the fast-growing functional beverage space. The company framed these moves as a way to align closely with a structural consumer shift toward zero-sugar, functional energy drinks, reinforcing its role in reshaping the energy beverage category. We will now examine how...
